reviews.title: He has 2 left hands!
reviews.text: Must’ve been a friday mode.More collectible? I still love the figure. Great conversation piece.
reviews.author: MoparMan

reviews.title: Willie Nelson for the win!
reviews.text: Great action figure. Only one of its kind with incredible detail. The accessories are absolutely fantastic as well. Delivered safe and fast. Bought it for someone’s birthday, they absolutely loved it. Will be buying one for myself soon. So happy neca made this figure and Best Buy has it in stock. Hope they neca releases more country greats soon. Will certainly buy the whole line. There are some great action figure reviews on YouTube for this collectible. Would highly recommend. 3 thumbs up.
reviews.author: MikeH

reviews.title: Willie Nelson Forever
reviews.text: This is such a great action figure. I bought one as a gift, then decided to purchase another for myself. The accessories that come with it are awesome. As a crazy Wilie Nelson fan, this is right what I never knew I needed in my life!
reviews.author: VroomVroom

reviews.title: Great Likeness
reviews.text: It is a great likeness of Willie and I am proud to own it

reviews.title: Willie Nelson figure
reviews.text: The Willie Nelson figure is spot-on!   The accessories are so adorable too!   He’s very easily poseable as well!   Love it!

reviews.title: Great, unique figure; well worth it.
